prompt: Wide eye-level photograph of a finished Methuen MA kitchen remodel in a 1980s colonial. White shaker cabinets with brushed-brass cup pulls line the perimeter under a quartz counter with a fine grey vein. The island is painted a deep matte navy, topped with the same quartz, with three woven-rattan pendant lights hanging above. Subway tile backsplash with dark grout. Wide-plank engineered oak floor. Shot with 35mm lens, mid-morning soft window light from a single garden window over the sink — even, unstaged, no hot spots. A red Stanley thermos sits on the island as the only fully saturated brand-red element. High-contrast slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor catalog feel. NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury staged. No readable text, no logos, no smiling people.
